[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000110 4
1 01011100 4
2 01011011 5
3 11110010 5
4 00101000 2
5 00000000 a
6 01011101 5
7 01100010 3

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 00000000 a match 5
23 32 10000000 1
34 43 01000100 2
45 54 01011000 3
56 65 01010010 3
67 76 00100000 1
70 07 00001000 1

02 20 00001001 2
13 31 01000010 2
24 42 00001000 1
35 53 01000010 2
46 64 01010000 2
57 75 00001000 1
60 06 01010000 2
71 17 00100000 1

03 30 01000100 2
14 41 01000000 1
25 52 00001001 2
36 63 11000010 3
47 74 00001000 1
50 05 01011001 4
61 16 01100010 3 match 7
72 27 00001000 1

04 40 01011100 4 match 1
15 51 01000010 2
26 62 10000000 1
37 73 00000000 a match 5
